title: Kubb Adapter Metadata
description: Schema for individual Kubb adapter metadata files

description.description: Short description of what the adapter does

featured.description: Whether to feature this adapter prominently

tags.description: Discovery tags for search and filtering

options.description: Adapter configuration options, used to auto-generate reference docs.

examples.description: Page-level ::: code-group rendered as the 'Example' section. Each tab can hold one or more files (typically a complete kubb.config.ts snippet).

intro.description: Free-form markdown rendered between <HeaderAdapter/> and the Installation section. Use for an opening paragraph, an overview diagram, etc.

notes.description: Page-level callouts rendered after the Installation section.

type.description: Callout flavour, mapped to VitePress >[!TYPE] directives.

title.description: Optional override for the callout title.
Optional tab title (rendered as `[title]` after the lang).

twoslash.description: When true and lang is typescript/ts, append ` twoslash` to the fence so VitePress renders inline type hints.

name.description: Optional file name comment rendered as the first line (e.g. 'kubb.config.ts').

twoslash.description: When true and lang is typescript/ts, append ` twoslash` to the fence so VitePress renders inline type hints.

name.description: Tab label inside the ::: code-group block.

files.description: Multi-file code listing concatenated inside one tab. Each file is rendered as its own fenced block.

codeBlock.description: One or more code blocks rendered after the body. Always prefer this over inline fenced code in `body` for TS/JSON snippets.

name.description: Option name as it appears in the adapter config (e.g. 'validate', 'serverIndex').

extends.description: Relative path to a shared option YAML (e.g. './_shared/core/output-path.yaml'). The referenced block is deep-merged under this option; locally-set fields win.

type.description: TypeScript type string shown in the docs table (e.g. 'string', 'boolean', 'Infinite | false').

default.description: Default value. Use a string representation (e.g. "'hooks'", "false", "0").

badge.description: Optional <Badge> rendered next to the option heading (e.g. {type: 'tip', text: 'beta'}).

experimental.description: When true, render the experimental icon next to the option heading.

typeDefinition.description: Multiline TypeScript type block, rendered in a fenced typescript code block under the option.

codeBlock.description: One or more fenced code blocks rendered after the property table. Use this for any TypeScript/JSON snippet (type defs, configuration excerpts, single-snippet examples) rather than inline fenced code in `body`/`description`/callouts.

examples.description: Multi-tab ::: code-group block. Use for value-per-tab snippets or multi-file walkthroughs.

tip.description: Markdown body rendered as a > [!TIP] callout.

note.description: Markdown body rendered as a > [!NOTE] callout.

important.description: Markdown body rendered as a > [!IMPORTANT] callout.

warning.description: Markdown body rendered as a > [!WARNING] callout.

details.description: Free-form sub-sections rendered as h4+ headings under the option (e.g. 'When to use', 'Default behavior').

body.description: Free-form markdown appended at the very end of the option (after callouts, code blocks, examples, details).

deprecated.description: Marks an option as deprecated. Presence implies deprecation; rendered as a `**Deprecated.**` callout.

note.description: Migration guidance shown after the deprecation marker.

icon.description: Adapter icon URLs. `light` is rendered on light backgrounds (and as the default); `dark` is an optional override for dark backgrounds.

light.description: Icon URL used on light backgrounds.

dark.description: Optional icon URL used on dark backgrounds; falls back to light when omitted.
